channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Family and community demand transparency in investigation of missing Sullivan children
item.description: A year after six-year-old Lilly Sullivan and her four-year-old brother Jack went missing from their home in rural Lansdowne Station, Nova Scotians gathered in Stellarton on Saturday to demand answers ...

item.title: Falconets Beat Malawi 2-0 in First Leg of U-20 Women’s World Cup Qualifier
item.description: Nigeria Under-20 women football team, the Falconets, don show better performance as dem beat Malawi 2-0 for the first leg of the final qualifying round for the FIFA U-20 Women’s World Cup. The match h...

item.title: Breaking Down the Factors Behind Gasoline Prices in the U.S.
item.description: The U.S. Energy Information Administration projected that nationwide retail gasoline prices would average $4.30 per gallon in April 2026, marking the year's peak monthly average. Gasoline prices are d...

item.title: Assam Opposition Confident of Forming Government Despite Exit Poll Predictions
item.description: In Assam, the opposition parties have strongly rejected the predictions made by recent exit polls, asserting that their alliance is fully prepared to form the next government in the state. The opposit...

item.title: King Charles inaugurates UK Space Agency project and coastguard station during Bermuda visit
item.description: On the final day of his royal visit to Bermuda, King Charles III inaugurated a new UK Space Agency observatory and launched Project Nova, aimed at tracking space debris such as old satellites and rock...

item.title: Nigeria’s Falconets start 2026 World Cup qualifier with 2-0 win over Malawi
item.description: Na Saturday for Ikenne-Remo, Nigeria U-20 girls team, wey dem dey call Falconets, show say dem get skills as dem beat Malawi 2-0 for first leg of FIFA U20 Women’s World Cup final round qualifier. From...

item.title: Kenyan Man Shares Success Story After Building KSh 9m Home in the UK
item.description: Evans Rutto, a Kenyan man from Eldoret, has shared his inspiring journey of building a KSh 9 million bungalow for his parents after relocating to the United Kingdom. Having moved to the UK in late 202...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford awarded honorary doctorate by Michigan university
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford was awarded an honorary Doctor of Humane Letters degree by Saginaw Valley State University in Michigan on Saturday. Wearing traditional academic regalia, Ford delivered a com...

item.title: Mini Crossword Puzzle and Superquiz for May 3
item.description: The Age presents its Superquiz for Sunday, May 3, 2026, inviting readers to challenge themselves with a range of puzzles. Among the highlights is the Mini Crossword, a concise puzzle featuring ten clu...

item.title: Heavy Rains Cause Floods and Landslides in Kenya, Leaving 10 Dead
item.description: Kenya is currently facing severe flooding and landslides due to persistent heavy rains, with the death toll reaching 10, according to the National Police Service. The Eastern region has suffered the m...

item.title: Kentucky Derby Reduced to 19 Horses Following The Puma's Withdrawal Due to Leg Injury
item.description: The 152nd Kentucky Derby will take place with 19 horses, following the scratch of The Puma due to a swollen leg caused by a skin infection. The withdrawal occurred just under 12 hours before the race'...

item.title: A Look at Concept Cars with Soft, Inflatable Exteriors
item.description: In this article, Moss and Fog explores an imaginative concept inspired by Skoda’s inflatable car design. The idea of 'puffy automobiles' proposes a whimsical, soft exterior for cars that would replace...

item.title: Balancing free speech and preventing antisemitism in pro-Palestinian protests
item.description: The Independent editorial discusses the delicate balance between the right to protest and the need to prevent antisemitism in the UK. Sir Keir Starmer has emphasised distinguishing between criticism o...

item.title: Three people fatally attacked in Rosemeadow, Sydney
item.description: In the early hours of Sunday, a violent incident in Rosemeadow, south-west Sydney, claimed the lives of three individuals. Emergency services discovered the body of a woman in her 60s and a man in his...

item.title: African Union Ministers Discuss Progress on Transport and Energy Integration Across the Continent
item.description: The African Union Commission wrapped up the Fifth Ordinary Session of the Specialised Technical Committee on Transport and Energy (STC-T&E) in Johannesburg, from 27 to 30 April 2026. Ministers and exp...

item.title: Trailer Release: Ayushmann Khurrana Stars in Pati Patni Aur Woh Do, Exploring Complex Relationships
item.description: The much-awaited trailer for the upcoming film 'Pati Patni Aur Woh Do', directed by Mudassar Aziz, has been released. The story revolves around a police officer who finds himself in a complicated pers...

item.title: San Bernardino Police Raid Sunshine Motel, Arrest Manager on Pimping Charges, Hotel Closed for Safety Violations
item.description: In late April 2026, the San Bernardino Police Department conducted a tactical raid on the Sunshine Motel, located on the 500 block of North H Street, as part of an investigation into pimping and pande...

item.title: Nigerian Army Investigates Justice Crack Over Soldiers’ Welfare Complaints
item.description: The Nigerian Army don confirm say dem don arrest social media influencer, Justice Mark Chidiebere, wey dem sabi as Justice Crack. Dis na because some soldiers don complain online about how dem dey cho...

item.title: Tanzanian Arrested Over Murder of 11-Year-Old Girl in Kisauni
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has arrested a Tanzanian man, Anthony Juma, also known as Kipara, in connection with the tragic killing of 11-year-old Glorious Kaiza Maore in Kisauni....

item.title: Durban City eyes first Nedbank Cup trophy and R7 million prize
item.description: Durban City FC are set to make history this Saturday as they take on TS Galaxy FC in the Nedbank Cup final at the Peter Mokaba Stadium. This match represents a milestone for a club still striving to c...
